overall.description: A cinematic nighttime scene in a pine forest, likely from a video game (resembling Red Dead Redemption 2), showing a cow standing near a tree while illuminated by a nearby campfire. The camera remains stationary throughout, capturing the atmospheric interplay of cool moonlight and warm firelight in a tranquil wilderness setting.

agents.ego_description: sitting or crouching near a campfire, quietly observing the surroundings and the nearby animal

notable_agents.action: cow standing near a tree, occasionally lowering its head to graze on the grass

entered.detail: tall pine tree trunk with rough bark texture dominating the center of the frame
pile of logs or rocks lying in the grass to the left of the frame
dense pine trees silhouetted against the dark blue night sky with visible moonlight
tall grass illuminated by warm orange firelight in the foreground

segments.scene_description: A tranquil nighttime scene in a pine forest clearing, illuminated by the warm glow of a nearby campfire. A cow stands near a large tree trunk in the center-right, occasionally lowering its head to graze on the illuminated grass. The camera remains stationary throughout, capturing the atmospheric contrast between the cool blue moonlight filtering through the distant trees and the orange firelight casting long shadows across the clearing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a tranquil nighttime scene in a pine forest clearing where warm firelight contrasts with cool moonlight. It begins with a stationary view of a cow standing beside a large tree trunk, bathed in the orange glow of a nearby campfire. As the animal occasionally lowers its head to graze on the illuminated grass, the camera maintains its position to emphasize the atmospheric interplay of light. The scene then settles into a steady observation of the wilderness, where long shadows stretch across the clearing while blue moonlight filters through the distant trees.
